Title: Change in employee account credentials
Notes: Got an email from David regarding the required changes to Sandy Gimpelson’s Microsoft account due to her retirement. As per his instructions, email forwarding and auto-responder were configured, the account password was updated, and the account termination was scheduled accordingly. All requested changes were completed successfully, and the same was confirmed to David via email.

Title: Re: [Huntress Detection] LOW - Incident on AAOC-ExecutiveDirector (AOC - Apartment Association of Orange County)
Notes:
A security alert was received indicating the presence of an unencrypted file containing passwords on the user’s system:

The user (Cordero) was notified of the security risk associated with storing passwords in an unencrypted file. Instructions were provided to either:

  • Encrypt the file using a strong password (File > Info > Protect Document > Encrypt with Password), or

  • Delete the file if it is no longer needed to eliminate the security risk.

Awaiting user confirmation or action. Assistance offered if needed.

Title: Weekly Firewall Backup – AOC
Notes:
Ticket Summary

Performed the weekly firewall backup for AOC. Logged in to the firewall, downloaded the latest configuration backup file, and uploaded the backup to the Teams channel for recordkeeping and reference. Verified that the backup completed successfully.

Title: Debbie- Laptop showing offline in portals for more than 2 months
Notes:
While checking agents status in manage engine portals for AOC client, found the machine Debbie-Laptop was showing offline for more than 2 months. SO verified the machine in my remote portal, it was not there, then checked machine in other portals it has same status offline for more than 60 days.

So removed the machine from all the portals.

Notes:
Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine AAOC-25 running with old version of 
Manage-Engine. So connected to the machine  and then uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest
version (11.4.2528.28.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

Title: Missing Patch Update on the AAOC-25,AAOC-24,AAOC-20 & AAOC-ExecutiveDirector computers
Notes:
As per the patch management review, the following drivers were identified and updated on the affected systems (AAOC-25, AAOC-24, AAOC-20, AAOC-ExecutiveDirector):

  • Ethernet Connection (2) – Intel I219-LM
    Version: 12.19.2.65

  • Intel UHD Graphics 620
    Version: 31.0.101.2135

After installation, a post-update scan was performed from the ManageEngine console to clear the patch status.
